race.comment: SEASIDER (2) has gone from strength to strength since winning the Western final of this series at Bathurst in January, gaining a Chariots of Fire berth by placing in the Hondo Grattan here and beating a good field to win the Riverina Championships last month. Has won five of nine tries at this distance and is well served by the low draw. IMA BOXA (11) led and was run down when midfield start but was flying prior. Draws on the back row but came from there to easily win both a heat and the final of the Metropolitan series prior. He is big on talent and is a huge chance. THALASSOPHOBIA (1) powered back into form by beating beat IMA BOXA for a surprise win here last start. The ace draw sees him in contention again. TUKAHA (5) looks to be in form at the right time having won from this barrier here last start. GROSSO NASO (8) draws wide but is ticking along well. Worth including at odds.
